title: openreview Auth Schema
description: API keys for AI providers. Flat key-value format. Only providers the user uses need to be present. Created with chmod 600 on Unix. Warning only on Windows.

openai.description: OpenAI API key. Override: OPENAI_API_KEY env var.

anthropic.description: Anthropic API key. Override: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var.

openrouter.description: OpenRouter API key. Override: OPENROUTER_API_KEY env var.

cohere.description: Cohere API key. Override: COHERE_API_KEY env var.

huggingface.description: HuggingFace API key. Override: HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY env var.

google.description: Google AI API key (Gemini). Override: GOOGLE_API_KEY env var.
